# The Best Skin and Hair Clinic in Hyderabad

We all deserve to feel confident and radiant in our own skin and hair. At Dermiq, that’s our mission!
Recognized by the Time Health Survey as the **Best skin clinic in Hyderabad**, we’re dedicated to
providing exceptional care that addresses your specific concerns and helps you achieve your beauty
goals.

Our team is the heart of Dermiq. We have Hyderabad’s best and most experienced dermatologists and
cosmetologists, all board-certified for your peace of mind. This ensures you receive the most effective
and personalized treatment plan possible, so you can achieve your healthiest, most beautiful skin and
hair. As a trusted hair clinic in Hyderabad, we focus on delivering solutions that bring back your
confidence with every session.


## What Does Dermiq Have To Offer?

We understand that everyone desires healthy, beautiful skin and hair. But sometimes, unwanted concerns
like acne, pigmentation, or hair thinning can hold us back. That’s where Dermiq comes in. Whether you’re
looking to achieve a clearer complexion through innovative skin rejuvenation techniques, reduce the
appearance of wrinkles with anti-aging treatments, or combat hair loss with our comprehensive care
solutions, our **Best skin clinic in Hyderabad** offers a variety of treatments tailored to your
needs. Our team combines their expertise with the latest technology to deliver effective results. Trust
us to be your partner on your journey to beautiful skin and hair, and discover why we are a top choice
for those seeking a reliable hair clinic in Hyderabad.


![Image](https://www.dermiqclinic.com/assets/img/Our-Services.png)

## Our Services

We offer a variety of services tailored just for you. The most important thing we know is
that everyone’s needs are different, so we don’t offer a one-size-fits-all approach. Whether
you want smoother, clearer skin, thicker, healthier hair, or a permanent solution to
unwanted body hair, Dermiq is just an appointment away.


Our team of Hyderabad’s most trusted dermatologists and cosmetologists boasts expertise in
advanced procedures like laser hair removal, offering a permanent solution for unwanted hair
at our **Best skin clinic in Hyderabad.** They also tackle stubborn skin concerns like
acne and pigmentation with innovative treatments like MNRF therapy. But that’s not all! Our
menu extends to services like scalp micro-needling for hair restoration, chemical peels for
a refreshed appearance, and advanced anti-aging solutions like Botox and dermal fillers. As
a leading hair clinic in Hyderabad, we are committed to providing top-tier solutions that
address the root cause of your concerns.


At Dermiq, we go beyond just fixing problems. As the **Best skin & hair clinic in**
**Hyderabad**, we’re passionate about helping you achieve your natural beauty goals and
feel great about yourself. Whether you desire that healthy glow or luscious hair, we have
the right solutions for you.


## Our Specialites

[![Image](https://www.dermiqclinic.com/assets/img/Hair-transplation.png)](https://www.dermiqclinic.com/)

### [Hair Transplantation](https://www.dermiqclinic.com/)

Hair transplantation is a highly effective procedure for restoring lost hair
by relocating healthy follicles to thinning or balding areas. It provides a permanent,
natural-looking solution for those struggling with hair loss. Dermiq is one of the best clinics
offering advanced hair care treatments for the best results.

[Read more](https://www.dermiqclinic.com/service/hair-transplantation)

[![Image](https://www.dermiqclinic.com/assets/img/Laser-Hair-Removal.png)](https://www.dermiqclinic.com/)

### [Laser Hair Removal](https://www.dermiqclinic.com/)

For many men and women, hair removal is a never-ending, time-consuming and
laborious process, but
it need not be such a hardship. Laser Hair Reduction is a skin investment that you make today to
get your dividends for life!

[Read more](https://www.dermiqclinic.com/service/laser-hair-removal-treatment-in-hyderabad)

[![Image](https://www.dermiqclinic.com/assets/img/Laser-skin-toning.png)](https://www.dermiqclinic.com/)

### [Laser Skin Toning](https://www.dermiqclinic.com/)

Laser toning is a gentler alternative to ablative laser treatments, with no
downtime and a low
risk of complications for all skin types.

[Read more](https://www.dermiqclinic.com/service/laser-skin-toning-treatment)

[![Image](https://www.dermiqclinic.com/assets/img/Antii-aging-service.png)](https://www.dermiqclinic.com/)

### [Anti-Ageing Treatment](https://www.dermiqclinic.com/)

Discover the secret to timeless beauty with our revolutionary anti-ageing
treatment at Dermiq.
Our expert techniques target fine lines, wrinkles, and imperfections, unveiling a rejuvenated
and youthful complexion.

[Read more](https://www.dermiqclinic.com/service/anti-ageing-treatment)

[![Image](https://www.dermiqclinic.com/assets/img/skin-lightening.png)](https://www.dermiqclinic.com/)

### [Skin Lightening Treatment](https://www.dermiqclinic.com/)

You might notice that your skin tone has darkened over time. This may occur
as a result of daily
sun exposure. You might also choose to reclaim your original color.

[Read more](https://www.dermiqclinic.com/service/skin-lightening-treatment)

[![Image](https://www.dermiqclinic.com/assets/img/Dark-Circle.png)](https://www.dermiqclinic.com/)

### [Dark Circle Treatment](https://www.dermiqclinic.com/)

Dark circle treatment helps reduce puffiness and discoloration around the
eyes, restoring a refreshed, youthful look. With the right care, it targets the causes of dark
circles for smoother, brighter skin. Experience a more rested and rejuvenated appearance with
effective treatment options.


[Read more](https://www.dermiqclinic.com/service/dark-circles-treatment)

[![Image](https://www.dermiqclinic.com/assets/img/Hair-loss.png)](https://www.dermiqclinic.com/)

### [Hair Loss Treatment](https://www.dermiqclinic.com/)

Say goodbye to hair loss woes with our advanced and personalized hair loss
treatment at Dermiq.
Our non-invasive solutions address hair loss concerns, promoting regrowth and restoring your
confidence.

[Read more](https://www.dermiqclinic.com/service/hair-loss-treatment-in-hyderabad)

[![Image](https://www.dermiqclinic.com/assets/img/skin-rejuvenation.png)](https://www.dermiqclinic.com/)

### [Skin Rejuvenation Treatment](https://www.dermiqclinic.com/)

Embark on a journey of skin renewal with our skin rejuvenation treatments at
Dermiq. Uncover a
more youthful and radiant appearance as we address specific concerns and promote overall skin
health.

[Read more](https://www.dermiqclinic.com/service/skin-rejuvenation-treatment)

[![Image](https://www.dermiqclinic.com/assets/img/Hydra-facial-home.png)](https://www.dermiqclinic.com/)

### [Hydra Facial](https://www.dermiqclinic.com/)

Indulge in the ultimate skincare luxury with our HydraFacial treatment at
Dermiq. Immerse your
skin in a revitalizing experience that goes beyond conventional facials. Our non-invasive
HydraFacial deeply hydrates, cleanses, and nourishes your skin.

[Read more](https://www.dermiqclinic.com/service/hydra-facial-treatment)

## Why Choose Dermiq?

Choosing the best skin clinic in Hyderabad can feel overwhelming, but we make it simple. At
Dermiq, we believe you deserve exceptional care that’s both effective and thoughtfully
delivered, without compromising on safety or comfort. Our team of experienced specialists,
recognized among the city’s finest, tailors every treatment plan specifically to your unique
skin and hair needs.



We combine trusted, scientifically backed techniques with cutting-edge technology to ensure
precise and safe treatments. Our clinic is equipped with the latest laser systems and advanced
machines, allowing us to target concerns with remarkable accuracy and minimal downtime. From
laser therapies to specialized equipment for hair restoration, each device is carefully selected
to maximize results while maintaining your safety as our priority.


Countless satisfied clients vouch for our success, not just in improving appearances but in
enhancing confidence and well-being. At Dermiq, we don’t just treat skin and hair; we nurture
your journey toward feeling truly comfortable and radiant in your own skin.

Choose Dermiq for a treatment experience that blends expert knowledge, advanced technology, and
genuine care. See the difference precision and dedication make.

## OUR QUALIFIED DOCTORS

![Image](https://www.dermiqclinic.com/assets/img/Doctor-1.png)

### Dr. VijayaDeepika Narra .MD

Dermatologist

Dr. Deepika is a Consultant Dermatologist, Cosmetologist, and Trichologist, with 9+ years of
experience in treating all types of concerns relating to Skin and Hair.

![Image](https://www.dermiqclinic.com/assets/img/Doctor-3.png)

### Dr. B Lakshmi Divya .MD

Dermatologist

Dr. Divya holds MD in Dermatology. She is a skilled Dermatologist, Cosmetologist, and
Trichologist practicing for over 8+ years.

![Dr. Divyasree](https://www.dermiqclinic.com/assets/img/Doctor-2.png)

### Dr. Divyasree P .MD

Dermatologist

Dr. Divyasree is an MD in Dermatology and has been working as a Consultant Dermatologist and
Cosmetologist for 8+ years.

![Dr. Divyasree](https://www.dermiqclinic.com/assets/img/Dr-Kavya.png)

### Dr. Kavya Kondaveeti

Consultant Dermatologist and Cosmetologist

Dr. Kavya has 4 years of experience in dermatology, specializing in advanced skin treatments,
hair restoration, and anti-aging procedures. She is committed to offering customized
solutions that focus on long-term skin health and aesthetic enhancement.


![Dr-Sundeep](https://www.dermiqclinic.com/assets/img/Dr-Sundeep.png)

### Dr. Sundeep

Consultant Dermatologist

Dr. Sundeep is a highly skilled dermatologist specializing in skin, hair, and nail
conditions, with expertise in both medical and aesthetic treatments. His approach combines
strong diagnostic abilities with evidence-based solutions, ensuring effective care for every
patient.


![Dr. Divyasree](https://www.dermiqclinic.com/assets/img/Dr-Jyothirmai.png)

### Dr. Jyothirmai

Consultant Dermatologist, Trichologist & Cosmetologist

With over 3 years of experience, Dr. Jyothirmai specializes in treating skin, hair, and
cosmetic concerns at Dermiq Skin Clinic. She holds an MD in Dermatology from Guntur Medical
College and stays updated with the latest advancements to provide effective, evidence-based
treatments.


![Dr. Nikitha Nellore](https://www.dermiqclinic.com/assets/img/Dr-Nikitha-Nellore.png)

### Dr. Nikitha Nellore

Hair Transplantation
